title: Evidence Envelope
description: Standard wrapper the runner places around every JSON evidence file. metadata = facts about the collection; payload = the fetcher's raw output. See docs/envelope_design.md.

evidence_set.description: Paramify evidence-set identity copied from the fetcher's fetcher.yaml, so the file is self-describing for upload. Present only when the fetcher declares an evidence_set block.

validation.description: Schema-verification record, written by the runner only when the fetcher declares an evidence_set.schema_binding. ok=false means the artifact failed its declared schema (exit code 2; held from upload). Conformance to structure only — never a judgment of compliance content.

validator.description: Library + version that performed the validation.

errors.description: Machine-readable failures (capped; error_count is the true total). path is a JSON pointer into the payload ('' = root).
